title: HLG材质包
description: The HLG texture pack is a resource pack that covers the textures of some mods and the original textures.
body:
The Red Dragon Fruit（HLG） Texture Pack is made by the Red Dragon Fruit Production Team.

It includes the redrawing of textures for some mods and the original version, as well as the Chinese localization of texts.

The redrawn mods:
TFC (The Fabled Craftsman) and some of its add-ons
AE2 (Applied Energistics 2) and some of its add-ons
And the redrawing of a small number of textures for some mods

- Texture drawing: 线框, 碗粥, 被子, eek, 花草忍, 吞某, 陌林
- Code guidance: 龙舞, 花草忍
- Model building: 碗粥, 被子, 线框
- Stones: eek
- Bricklayer: 线框, 吞某
- Technical guidance: 总得有希望
